sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51317" key="i)/sxnansis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἴσχν-ανσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n51317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">emaciation</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:3:69" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.69</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg016:80(75)" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.80(75)</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4034.tlg002:46:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mich.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in PN</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">46.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
